3078940.name: CHAIRS Soundtrack
3078940.description:
Perfect your transformation into chairhood with Fixture Friend approved music! The CHAIRS soundtrack includes all the tracks you know and love! Let the BEATS and TUNES numb your senses as wood hugs what once was bone with this free add-on?!?!!???

Features


  • Bonus Tracks - We've unearthed a beta cassette tape hidden in an ancient vault...
  • High Quality Recordings - The OST is available in both MP3 and .WAV formats!
  • No Subliminal Messages - The Fixture Friends will never try to make you sell your soul?
